channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: No really, why aren't you all in on AI? — 37 replies — 58.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
No really, why aren't you all in on AI?

Open thread • Replies: 37 • Updated: 2026-04-13 05:28 UTC

OP

Teachers won't exist in 10 years
90% of jobs can be automated
It will solve cancer.
It will solve climate change
Your children will not work a 9-5
Human intelligence will be worthless
Spelling, curvsive and on will be worthless
You will know everything.
Colleges won't exist.
Every movie will use some form of ai
Everyone will have a literal superior 24/7 therapist for 100 outs a year
Fusion energy will be solved.
We will live longer
You WILL probably be unemployed in 5 years.

Are you getting it through your skull yet? You will not be living in the same world.

Invest literally ever penny now, retard. Stop being dense and contrarian.

Early replies (first 3)

62108184
>>62108143
It's a bubble.

62108199
It's a gimmick and has fallen flat on its face in every business I've seen try implement it (I worked with them). An expensive write off for companies that have fallen for the hype.

62108229
>>62108184
>>62108199
Are you seriously low IQ or something?

We literally won't have boomer ideology wars anymore. The same therapist ais can be used to "translate" the other side as it "gets" both sides more than they get themselves through superior pattern recognition.

Yes. I'll say it: AI will end the culture wars. Have a conversation about why liberals "do" something right now and you will get it. Mankind's greatest invention is here.

I'll say it again:
Mankind's greatest invention is here.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62108866
>>62108199
This.

Too many reasons that it's a bad investment.

Company data governance isn't ready. Staff won't use it or set it up properly. People will be fearful and resistant to it if it ever gets good. Too expensive even when it's heavily subsidised.

Show me a job that ai made easier

62108871
>>62108143
How do you go all in on AI?

Investing in already huge companies is a waste of time, and the small promising ones are private.

62108880
>>62108143
>Teachers won't exist
Just like the internet was going to put universities out of business because of online learning?

62108883
>>62108866
>Show me a job that ai made easier
you must literally live under a rock. coding is changed forever. customer service tickets and call centers are changed forever. my company let go 80% of the admins. the list is probably endless and growing.

62108887
>>62108871
SNDK went up 2000% last year. tons of chip stocks can still 5x. if AMD 10x it would still be smaller than NVDA today. etc

62108892
>>62108883
It's let non coders Crete incredibly janky unoptimised code that will not last a year's worth of updates. Short term I understand your astonishment, but mid to long term, nobody will trust anything built with ai

62108894
>>62108880
tons of small colleges close every year. some of it may be online classes at larger better known schools.

62108903
>>62108892
you do literally live under a rock. SWE dont code manually anymore.

62108909
>>62108903
You're not listening so why even pretend to have a discussion

62108917
>>62108143
>Teachers won't exist in 10 years
Teachers are like the last job that will go away nigga, they literally exist so parents can send their kids to fuck off somewhere while they go to work. They're glorified kindergarten caretakers that may or may not teach the little shits to read in the meantime. Like even shilling AI to death that's the job that doesn't stop existing.

62108925
>>62108267
>>62108789
Dude, Churches are going to replace musicians for 100/mo ai music.

There will be two types of people: Those who got AI and those who didn't

62108937
>>62108143
>its gonna solve all the problems so much that..... you need a 24/7 therapist?

62108944
>>62108909
non coder =/= SWE

>Show me a job ai made easier
clown. stay under your rock lol.

62108947
>>62108143
>and video games will become more realistic

62108952
>>62108925
Nobody is going to spend $100 per month to generate AI slop church music.

62109012
>>62108952
No one's going to pay 800 per musician when you can make top tier church music for 100 a month

62109021
>>62109012
No, they are going to continue paying $10 per month or less to stream it. Or they will use CDs or other digital methods. If you are implying AI slop will replace live musicians you are severely delusional. People pay for live musicians because they want a human being there playing music. AI musicians are equivalent to streaming from spotify, except it sucks ass.

62109023
>>62108143
>Your children will not work a 9-5
You're right everyone will be doordash drivers since there won't be jobs.

62109045
>>62109021
..Anonymous (ID: Jc00+4Eg)
04/12/26(Sun)19:24:55 No.62109021
>>62109012 #
No, they are going to continue paying $10 per month or less to stream it. Or they will use CDs or other digital methods. If you are implying AI slop will replace live musicians you are severely delusional. People pay for live musicians because they want a human being there playing music. AI musicians are equivalent to streaming from spotify, except it sucks ass.

No because you're not already paying for for it. Your ai bill will be your new phone and electricity bill.

62109053
>>62109045
If you're implying we will essentially be forced to pay for AI slop because it will replace the availability of other services, I agree that is possible. However that is a completely different argument to what you've been spouting thus far. You haven't responded to anything I said, you've just changed to a different and much more speculative argument. Pathetic.

62109068
>>62108143
Let me know when AI can get a NEET off video games and into a job.

62109080
>>62108229
>We literally won't have boomer ideology wars anymore
Let me know when AI has achieved peace in the Middle East.

62109088
>>62108917
Let me know when AI can provide pre-school child care.

This is important. All the existing day care workers are immigrants who will be deported.

62109091
>>62109012
Wanna know how we know you've never been to church?

62109123
>>62108143
Because the only type of "AI" they're working on right now is LLM tech. AI is way more than just annoying chatbots. Until they start funding more fields of AI research I am simply not interested in this gay techbro clown show (which carries the same energy as the fake and gay pandemic hysteria of 2020-2022)

62109180
>>62109053
>>62109080
>>62109091
You're going to feel so retarded in 3 years lol

62109191
>>62109180
You said the same shit 3+ years ago, and it's only gotten slightly better at coding.

62109991
>>62108143
The top is already in bro. You missed the gold rush already if you didn't start previously.

62110026
>>62108952
>>62109012
A real church would know AI is demons trapped in silicon and never use it.

62110029
>>62109991
>The top is already in bro.
These are the very earliest days of AI. This is like investing in car makers in 1920.

item.title: PERSON OF COLOR MONDAY — 14 replies — 56.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
PERSON OF COLOR MONDAY

Open thread • Replies: 14 • Updated: 2026-04-13 06:00 UTC

OP

PERSON OF COLOR MONDAY

Early replies (first 3)

62108817
Its Sunday

62108843
colored person monday

62109067
It literally costs 0 (zero) dollars ($) to be racist

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62109077
>>62108800

62109107
>>62108800
NIGER MONDAY

62109555
>>62108800
FAGGOT SUNDAY

62109566
>>62108800
>racism in the '26
YIKES

62109609
>>62109566
*KIKES

62109641
>>62108800
based!

62109914
>>62108817
Theyre most likely posting from India or some piece of shit country off southeast asia. Unserious timezones

62110024
>>62109641
>AWOOGA
Get out of my way, daddy has to got to inseminate a mulatto into that AWOOGA

62110065
N

62110066
I

62110068
>>62108800
More like Orange Retard Monday

item.title: It costs 300k to raise a kid — 33 replies — 54.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
It costs 300k to raise a kid

Open thread • Replies: 33 • Updated: 2026-04-13 05:29 UTC

OP

WTF are normies doing? What are they even spending money on?
Now women refuse to have kids because it'll nuke their lifestyle, while destitute browns have 10 kids.

>buy diapers
>food cost is negligible
>hand me down clothes
>wife does child care
>public school is free

I bet /biz/ could raise a kid on 20k.

Early replies (first 3)

62104065
>>62104059
Basterd benchid donut rase da kid! Shalom rabbi!

62104067
>>62104059
govs keep raising taxes as if that doesnt have a cost. "its only 750 more dollars this year bro! gotta pay for bloated bureaucracy bro!"

62104095
>>62104059
I do believe you also factor in opportunity costs. you support a child for what? 20-25 years? thats money that could have been in the stock market. I child also requires you to move into a better neighborhood, bigger apartment, bigger car and everything else that comes with it. 200-300k sounds realistic over that time span. just because you can live frugally, doesnt mean your child can.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62104104
>>62104059
Why does every media picture that has a baby involved always has brown babies in it and whenever abortion or anti-natalism is involved there use pics of white people and babies?

62104107
>>62104104
Jews have plans and u know it, dont ask stupid questions!

62104113
>>62104059
Women don't want to have kids and I don't blame them. Human pregnancy is inefficient compared to other animals due to the head size of human babies. It radically changes the body and the person for the rest of their life. There is minimal "bounce" back. The brain changes. We will have artificial wombs one day, so these issues of people not having or wanting children will be moot when an artificial incubator can do all the work. They'll also be able to make babies from your skin, so you won't even need to find a woman to procreate with anymore if you so choose.

62104117
>>62104113
Hey vitalik! Hows mainnet scaling?

62104123
>>62104059
>wife does child care
This thing alone will cost millions in lost opportunity. You realize that now both of your retirements are on you?

62104153
>>62104059
Every time I see someone with kids I am thankful I'm not them. I can't imagine spending 300k on them and having no freedom or free time. inb4 /biz/ copes about kids being cheap because of "muh hand me downs" and "muh food is cheap". We all know that's bullshit just like your 200k remote do-nothing job and 8 inch dick.

62104255
>>62104059
>food cost is negligible
Lmao
>hand me down clothes
Not everybody has close family
>wife does child care
Sure, unless she has a phone or TV and gets blasted with propaganda to be a stronk independent wahmen
>public school is free
Your whole list could have been summarized with:
>I'm not 18 yet and I don't get it

62104511
>>62104059
>kids
It's
>keeyids

62104518
>>62104059
Usually it costs 800k, but when a nigger is depicted it suddenly goes down to 300k.

62104534
>>62104059
Thats for 18 years you fucking tard

62104581
>>62104059
that picture is AI

62104957
>>62104113
Naturally
A: Women get their first child as teen when the bones can still grow
B: Women eat real food and are not malnoutrished so they have wide hips
And bam birth is easy. You retard think nature made an error? Civilization made an error.

62104970
>>62104059
if you don't vax them, healthcare goes down to zero. homeschool them and they won't care about buying dumb shit because the other kid has it.

62105055
>>62104059
Maybe they cost 10k max

62105057
>>62104113
>moot
Who?

62105076
>>62104095
This. Raising a child when he’s still a 40 year old, kissless virgin living with his parents will cost them at least $300k by then. Parents pray that Skeeter Jean, JiDion, ElizXbeth or Alex Rosen catch him with CP on his phone one day and let the cops send their mankid to jail for life and put the parents out of their misery lol

62105950
They keep inflating these numbers by adding in the cost of college and assuming that additional kids don't get marginally cheaper as you accumulate stuff that can become hand-me-downs. They also assume you're a total goy-cattle and buy everything from clothes to baby toys brand new.

Violently reject the anti natal propaganda

It has never been easier for you to have an outsized impact on the demographic and genetic future of the species than now. US total fertility is 1.57 on average. Globally, the only populations that are technologically capable and not in TFR freefall are Israelis (including the secular ones), the Nordics, and Anglo settler states (USA/CAN/AU/NZ). These are the only population groups worth betting on or forming business ventures with. Because they are the only ones that are going to matter.

Get your genes onto the orbital habitats.

62106191
>>62104059
So new dad with a 1.5 yr old.
Kid expenses:
>0-6 months
Food: $0 (only breastmilk)
Clothes: $150 (once upon a child for discount clothes and toys)
Toys: $100
Carrier: $0 (family friend's old one)

>6-12 months
Food: maybe like a $100? (She would eat like half a cucumber or three chocolate chips for a "meal" + breast milk)
Clothes: $200 (bigger = more fabric = little more expensive)
Toys: $200 (also relatives gift a lot if toys so not bad
Carrier: $150 (size up)

12-16 months
Food: 300? Idk, still not much at all
Clothes: $400 (i got her a bunch of non-discount stuff because i thought it looked cute, not a necessary expense)
Toys: 150
Carrier: same size

62106346
>>62104123
/biz/ makes me feel sane. I was also thinking the same thing.

>childhood friend gets his first gf at 29
>married and had a baby within a year of meeting her
>got her pregnant while she was finishing her masters
>fast forward 2 years
>son has autism and some heart valve problem
>wife has never had a job at 28
>she plans to stay home with the son for another year, at least
>meanwhile my friend works like 60 hours a week making like 3500 euros a month
>needs to smoke, drink and binge shitty online games to keep up with the stress
>she doesn't even cook, they live in walking distance from her mom so she just eats there like 3-4 times a week with the kid and my friend has to order food or cook for himself


All I can think of is "what the actual fuck?"

62106420
>>62106191
R u a retard? You forgot diapers

62106481
>>62106346
>wife has never had a job at 28
my sister leaves her child at her/our parents for the majority of the time even though she is physically fit and earns really good money. the child is already 13 and as far as I can tell he considers his grandmother as his actual mother. despite all that she still makes demands on how to raise the child. I swear to fucking god modern women/mothers are cooked. everywhere you go you see mothers on their fucking smartphone instead of interacting with their child, let alone giving them internet/social media access early on. this is a lost generation. I look at my nephew and I get somewhat scared, not because of him but because I realize his generation has to build/main the world in the next 20 or so years and they are nowhere equipped to do so.

62106774
>>62104104
Jews

62106784
>>62104059
Damn. Every brownoid has millions to spend on kids.
>inb4 their spending our money
I know.

62107157
>>62104059
>wife does child care
heh

62107809
Literally just shop at costco this isn't hard.

62107817
>>62104059
All the cost are negligible other than daycare and sports even diapers. Anti-natalist propaganda is at its core evil unless youre a gnostic.

62107842
>>62104059
300k for their entire childhood? Good deal. I'm having one.

62107999
It's 300k unless you're black in which case it's free because they abandoned the kid.

62108026
>>62104511
eyy, yo whiteboi. joo know where joo at? stop trya dizz owo cullchure and shiiet

62110032
>>62106420
Cloth diapers + diapers cost fucking nothing. It is like 40 cents a diaper at costco and she wears like 5 a day max because cloth diapers exist and you just chuck those in the wash

item.title: 13 months of consistent investing and I’ve breached 50K am I GMI? — 48 replies — 37.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
13 months of consistent investing and I’ve breached 50K am I GMI?

Open thread • Replies: 48 • Updated: 2026-04-13 04:49 UTC

OP

13 months of consistent investing and I’ve breached 50K am I GMI?

Early replies (first 3)

62100428
>>62100422
which stocks

62100432
>>62100422
Based

62100469
5 digit heaven

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62103291
>>62100422
That's a horrible yearly wage.

62103329
>>62100422
Yes

62103345
>>62101884
Set and forget investing is underrated and SCHD is the king of that category. At least max your Roth IRA with SCHD.

62103349
>>62100422
>am I GMI?
Yep. Keep it up for only 20 years and you can retire as a millionaire unless inflation fucks you.

62103354
>>62100943
I went from 29k to 58k in 9 months here in Europe. Good job, anon.

62103407
>>62100422
this is the textbook way of doing it. id put 10k in MSFT now and wait a year to sell

62103516
>>62100474
>im still wealthier than you btw
>t.

62103545
>>62103354
What stock? You can't trade American stocks in Europe

62103565
>>62103545
Not one stock and of course I worked and saved money.

62103571
>>62100422
Congrats OP
>am I GMI
Yes fren, wagmi

62103694
>>62103345
My idea was whatever snowball happens from SCHD stock and dividend ratio growth would not outweigh total market returns but maybe I’m wrong
Hard to say cause it just shot up in value by twenty percent cause people wanted stability but then it flatlined

62103698
>>62103516
>>62100519

62103710
>>62103698
>french
Quot erat demonstrandum.

62103720
>>62103710
richer than you, despite the fact that you make 200k per year and me only 50k

skill issue i guess

62103721
>>62103698
en une heure?

62103726
>SCHD
>quarterly dividends
EWW no thank you only monthly payers for me, pay me like i’m your world of warcraft subscription baby

62104160
>>62103218
Oh yeah
I mostly focus on a lot of easy stuff I can passively do at work or home (have my own office at work and can use my phone)

62106274
>>62100422
50k wow now you can buy a used car. Cause your going to have to pay 30% of that to the government

62106320
>>62106274
>amerilard
>buys gaz guzzlers for 50k
Cringe.

62106428
>>62103710
>Quot
Quod

62106464
>>62100943
>bought a dip
Yesssssss, you can time the market because you are uniquely intelligent just keep doing it. You'll be a millionaire in no time.

62106603
>>62106464
Are you retarded

62106606
>>62100422
Actually yes you will make it. Keep this up another decade and youll have a milly. Then you can play the game of when do you feel like retiring?

62106619
>>62106603
Yeeeessssssss I am retarded you are so smart keep buying the dip, take out margin to buy the dip, sell your house to buy the dip, the line only goes up just keep putting money in always make financial decisions based on market conditions

62106822
>>62100943
The American empire is in decline, you need to be diversifying somewhat into VT or VXUS total-world / international etfs.

>>62101150
don't fall for this meme also. SCHD is for boomers who already have like 1~2 mil invested and want to just live off the dividends. If you are just starting you want high growth etf's and can move into SCHD later if you want.

62106841
>>62106619
OP never mentioned about aiming to buy the dip he said he did once luckily
Too busy posting your faggot copy pastas to read?
>>62106822
Also, good advice on getting more international stocks in your portfolio

62106939
>>62106274
>50k for a used car
basement dweller

62109488
Based

62109874
>>62100422
8000 of that is uncle sams the second you try and cash out lol

62109954
>>62103545
>You can't trade American stocks in Europe
LMAO lol wut. Sure you can.

item.title: Chainlink: Now that WLFI has been officially — 9 replies — 36.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Chainlink: Now that WLFI has been officially

Open thread • Replies: 9 • Updated: 2026-04-13 05:56 UTC

OP

exposed, do you think Chainlink regrets hyping up their partnership?

Early replies (first 3)

62108470
part 2

62108481
3 of 3

had to post the whole thing for you guys as i know many of you aren't very good with tech


does anyone remember when your god posted about how trump was the saylor of chainlink lmao i need to find that post

man talk about grim!

62108538
“lol” said the scorpion, “lmao even”

That said, this shit is brazen even for the most corrupt vermin to have ever set foot in DC.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62108549
you can't make up material this good

it's almost as if the cult craves being humiliated
it's like they get a rush from it. each time upping the stakes a little higher

that kind of behavior reminds me of a certain type of person. hmmm i can't quite place the term...

62108566
AHAHAHAHAHAHAHAAHAHAHAHHAHAAHAHAHAH

62109007
>>62108566
https://www.congress.gov/bill/119th-congress/house-bill/3633/text

I will accept the lesser evil of a President who is shilling a meme coin if it means the government is proactive in supporting the crypto industry as a whole. The previous administration was out to destroy crypto and the SEC charges were for that purpose, not for ensuring fairness. I understand his point about the corruption and deals made, but I will accept this pill to swallow, given no other alternatives.

62109011
>62108461
>62108470
>62108481
>62108549
>62108566
>hurrr chainlink = wlfi now
Pic related is who makes this twitter screencrap spam btw. An actual sissy gooner obsessed with watching niggers fuck women he likes

62109018
>>62109011
yikes

62110061
>>62108549
>you can't make up material this good
This

item.title: someone knows something (most likely TACO related) — 10 replies — 7.1/hr

someone knows something (most likely TACO related)

Open thread • Replies: 10 • Updated: 2026-04-13 04:42 UTC

OP

someone knows something
(most likely TACO related)

Early replies (first 3)

62109901
>negative 2M PNL

62109915
>>62109884
Im retarded and new to biz, can you explain it to me a little bit simpler please?

62109919
>>62109915
Just wait for taco tuesday and that faggot can buy all the dildos and boyfriends he wants

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62109922
>>62109901
it's not closed yet
we shall see

62109927
>>62109884
they know China needs oil and will tell Iran to stop

62109928
>>62109919
>TACO Tuesday
I think he'll move it to Wednesday.

62109931
>>62109884
everyone knows something

62109935
>>62109927
Iran can deliver oil to china and russia via the north passage

62109940
>>62109935
its the other 100 boats a day china needs to get the price back down

62109942
>china will sit around and let iran fuck its entire economy
no one believes that

item.title: This seems to be an undisclosed ad for USPS. — 9 replies — 5.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
This seems to be an undisclosed ad for USPS.

Open thread • Replies: 9 • Updated: 2026-04-13 04:30 UTC

OP

This seems to be an undisclosed ad for USPS. Given the high turnover rate, toxic work environment, and this guy coming from a white collar background, it's very unbelievable that this guy would find the job less stressful.

Early replies (first 3)

62109062
>>62109056
You can’t believe that working for a government where there’s no profit motive and thus no accountability would be easier than a high stress for-profit white collar job?

62109115
>>62109062
>no accountability

USPS is self-funded and not reliant on taxpayer money. Mailmen are tracked via GPS. You can't just decide to work less on some days.

62109130
>>62109056
>it's very unbelievable that this guy would find the job less stressful.
There are a few other odd things about that.

A quick search reveals he lives in Buffalo NY. Another quick check of the USPS employment site reveals a delivery employee earns about $21.89 an hour.

Three times his previous salary would be 90k a year.

That would require him to work approximately 80h a week or 15h a day in a five day week.

So even with overtime he'd have to be working his tits off if he doesn't have some super cushy supervision job.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62109227
>>62109130
based investigative anon

62109603
USPS rarely hires full time employees. It's mostly part time work because part timers have far less benefits and pay.

They just wait for full time workers to retire, and then fill the spot with some part time nobody that quits every few months

62109888
>>62109130
union grievances add up, overtime is paid if you go over 8hrs for the day AND over 40hrs per week, and new hires typically work six days a week there (max 12 hrs per day)

it's doable to hit $90k as a new hire but you'd be working constantly

62109891
>>62109888
>overtime is paid if you go over 8hrs for the day AND over 40hrs per week
meant and / or, it hits if either condition is met.

62109904
>>62109056
Bruh is only 53 but he already looks like Bernie Sanders. It's too late for him.

62109929
quick google suggests that there are people in the USPS union making 90k+
Hard to understand what involves their pay steps and raises and whatever criteria though

Highly doubt he can just job hop into a union shop and get paid max full time rate though

item.title: Day 1 of posting this atrocity until BTC is at 82k — 8 replies — 3.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
Day 1 of posting this atrocity until BTC is at 82k

Open thread • Replies: 8 • Updated: 2026-04-13 03:58 UTC

OP

Early replies (first 3)

62106268
She's kinda cute. Don't be a hater.

62106272
>>62106268
I hate this thing so much

62106282
dios mio

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62106450
kek

62106454
>>62106272
>I hate this thing so much
why do you plan to post it every day then

62106931
>>62106268
agreed anon, i would mouth her vagina

62109842
>>62106454
>fcking a retard
gross

62109865
>>62106264
Who

item.title: MELANIA sisters, we're SOOOO back!!! — 3 replies — 2.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
MELANIA sisters, we're SOOOO back!!!

Open thread • Replies: 3 • Updated: 2026-04-13 05:02 UTC

OP

>According to insiders, the Trump administration negociating with Iran will allow the blockade of the Strait of Hormuz on the condition that the toll will be paid either in Trump or in Melania crypto currencies.

https://x.com/cryptooverwatch/status/204323875507089622

Early replies (first 3)

62107386
>>62106851
Scam

62109953
>>62106851
> negociating

learn to spell Sundeep

62109977
>>62106851
by insiders do you mean the tapeworms in your guts giving you hallucinations?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

No additional replies in the latest window.

item.title: Polkadot - First halving — 300 replies — 256.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
Polkadot - First halving

Open thread • Replies: 300 • Updated: 2026-04-13 04:56 UTC

OP

https://polkadothalving.com/ 10 more days. https://www.parity.io/blog/refining-polkadots-economic-architecture-issuance-DOT-DAP-and-network-adjustments
https://x.com/Polkadot/status/2028482336463945765
"
Polkadot’s economic upgrade begins rolling out in 10 days.

Enhanced tokenomics increases DOT scarcity and introduces new governance and staking mechanisms.

▸ DOT supply capped at 2.1B
▸ Emissions cut 53.6%
▸ Unbonding from 28 days to 24-48 hours
"

Early replies (first 3)

61933757
Guys?

61933779
>>61932834
10000$ @ 6.5
i dont sell my dotty

61936705
Guys?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62091358
1.33>13 DECEMBER

62093297
>>62085250
>and then scrambling to make an EVM to attract more developers
Actually, even this is not completely really true to be honest. The whole point of DOT 1.0 was to be able to make L2s. That was done and complete and there's like 40 L2s running on DOT. Then DOT 2.0 came and with it came Asset hub. Asset hub is a COMMON GOOD L2 that can run, as you've mentioned, EVM smart contracts and also PVM smart contracts which are SUPERIOR to EVM because the use the RISC-V architecture. You literally make it seem like launching EVM compatibility is a bad choice where in reality it's a move forward in order to make the chain more flexible.

https://polkadot.polkassembly.io/referenda/1864 Deploy Universal Deterministic Deployment Proxy (CREATE2 Factory) on Asset Hub
This ref passed today making it so that people can launch their EVM smart contracts on the same address as they have on ETH or other L2s. So Uniswap will soon launch on Asset Hub on the same address as they're on ETH or any other L2.

62093456
>OP is desperate to shill his heavy bags.

62093506
>>62093456
>>OP is desperate to shill his heavy bags.
Actually I'm from Mumbai and Gavin Wood is paying the Mumbai warrior gang to keep the thread alive. I've already collected 11.5k DOT and every day after day 30 I get an additional 150 DOT. The thread is 35 days old. So I got 11.5k DOT + 5*150 DOT.
P.S.: Thank you Arjun for bumping the thread and giving me an excuse to re-bump it again. I'll come over to your house later and give you the money we were talking about. Good job my young Vishnu Mumbai warrior.

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62093917
>Poopman loves his gay little coin
I'm NOT a Vishnu Mumbai warrior. I'm Muslim!!!!

62094207
>>62093917
Nice, keep on bumping the thread Arjun, my little Mumbai warrior muslim living in Mumbai, the city of DOT. See you at the mosque on Sunday my little Mumbai warrior. Keep the bumps coming. I'll give you more DOT on Sunday for you effort.

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62094396
>>62094207
>See you at the mosque on Sunday
Friday, kaffir!

62094480
>>62094396
>Friday, kaffir!
Ah yes Arjun hajji, I have forgotten. Of course! Praise Allah, the al-ilah, all-powerful God. We are the chosen people. Everyone else is a goy. We shall rule the world with our DOTs, the crypto of Islam. Praise be Allah Christ Vishnu.

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62094791
>>62089608
>>62093506
>>62094480

Stop larping as an Indian

62095346
>>62094791
Good job Panjali. Bump the thread you I can bump it off your comment. Our small village of Mumbai shall eat for a year of this thread alone.

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62097729
Dear Mumbai warriors,

I hope you slurped the bottom. I hope you inhaled the smell for it is time. It is time to go back to where we belong. To 55$ and beyond. Mumbai warriors, it is OUR TIME.

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62097956
bump for polkacurry

62098919
>>62097956
Yes, my fren Rohit. We, the Mumbai Warriors, will eat the best PolkaCurry there is. We shall express gratefulness to our lord Wood while we eat with SPOONS I tell you my friend. The time where we ate with our bare hands is over Rohit. We shall consume our PolkaCurry with a metal SPOON Rohit. Today, we embark into the bright new future that was laid out thanks to our spiritual leader Lord Wood. Vishnu of the mindchain bless him. Oh Rohit, how far we have come. The Mumbai warriors shall bring the whole of Mumbai, the city of DOT, into a bright future. Soon the period of enlightenment begins. Mumbai warriors, if you can hear me, give me your best BATTLE SHOUT !!!

Shouts: "TOGETHER WE STAND UNITED AS PROUD MAN OF THE MIND CHAIN. RISE MY BRETHREN. RISE MY WARRIORS. TAKE UP YOUR ARMS AND LET'S FIGHT FOR OUT GLORIOUS LORD WOOD. FOR MUMBAI, THE CITY OF DOT AAAAAAAAAAA"

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62099150
>>62097729
Aren't you shorting DOT?

62099687
>>62099150
PSSSTTT, Panjali. Do I look like a Nintendo to you? Stop playing me and telling them the plan. Panjali, shut your mouth or no PolkaCurry for you young Vishnu mind. Do you want the Mumbai warriors to eat with metal spoons or with their hands? Do you want an age of enlightenment? If yes, then give us your best battle shout my young Vishnu warrior. Scream so hard that Gavin Wood, our spiritual leader, will hear your voice a top mount Hyjal.

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62100207
>>62099687
based street shitting dot preacher

62101334
>>62100207
Thank you. I try my best to be the best street shitter DOT preacher. We get paid really good and therefore we eat with metal spoons and not with our hands.

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62102768
Remember my young Vishnus of the mindchain. THIS YEAR NOMT + JAM go live on DOT (and other major upgrades). With that DOT will position itself to be about 10 years ahead of the competition. The bull market bottom has probably already been reached. Even if we go lower it won't be for more than like 10%. Maybe we'll get a black swan event mid summer, maybe we won't. The next cycle is probably going to be THE SUPER CYCLE, THE GOLDEN BULL RUN. I would position myself in a project that has some utility like DOT. The meme coin bullshitery is OVER. People are going to go back to their roots. There is no more stupidity left in the market. If you guys can't understand that then so help you Vishnu.

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62102845
Just realized this thread has been up for more than a month.

62102949
>>62102845
Yes, I've been saying that I'm paid by Gavin Wood directly and that we, the Mumbai warrirors, are eating with metal spoons instead of our hands because of it!

>>62068446
>>62071796
>>62071796
>>62079572

The Mumbai warriors are winning and we're entering a time of enlightenment in Mumbai because of it. PolkaCurry for everyone. Join us

62103152
My Mumbai warriors, my young Vishnus of the mind chain. Remember. This is THE bull run. I hope you are stacking. For this bull run will decide the winners from the losers. This is the GOLDEN bull run everyone has been talking about. This is IT. The decisive moment where the projects that will become the new Nvidia, Amazon, Google. Choose wisely my young Mumbai warriors for reality is not what it seems. If a coin has no utility. If the network can't handle millions of TPS at a cheap cost then there is no point in investing into it. DOT has everything anyone would think of as an important feature to have and soon, this year, JAM and NOMT and other major upgrades will hit. It'll revolutionize what the sector STANDARD is. Soon my brethren we will be called THE CHAIN. We will be a major focal point, a nexus if you will, for the whole Web3 world. We will be the center and the bridge for every other chain. Enlightenment is upon us my Mumbai warriors. Rise my brethren, rise into a new dawn of magic.

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62103167
Kafir token!

62104249
100$ END OF BULL RUN MY YOUNG VISHNU MIND CHAIN MUMBAI BRETHREN WARRIORS.

62104293
>>62103152
>>62104249

Not indian.

62105141
>>62104293
Good one Panjali. You will get many DOTs once we meet at the shrine of Gavin, in Mumbai city, the city of DOT, the city of the Mumbai warriors. Yes Panjali, we shall eat with METAL spoons. We shall consume our PolkaCurry with pride and dignity. We won't eat with our hands no more. It is done. We have evolved, we have become enlightened, we are one with existence.

62107462
100$ end of bull run

62107808
>>62107462
75$
For me IMHO.

62109094
>>62107808
Very good my good sar Mumbai warrior sar. Yes yes. We shall eat with metal spoons once we reach the nirvana of 75$

Not sure if you guys noticed. https://staking.polkadot.cloud/#/overview - The APY is 5.33% and 53.14% of the supply is staked. Therefore the inflation = 5.33 * 0.5314 = 2.832362%. So the inflation is basically 2.83% now and I think the 5.33% is the AVERAGE of the last month therefore we still have like 1 or 3 more days until a full month will pass since the 1st halving. Not sure if the halving was on the 13th or the 15th. I know they said PI day and at the same time I'm not 100% if the actual drop happened on PI day... So yea. But what I'm saying is that the inflation dropped from like 8-10% to now 2.8%.

62109790
My good sars, the bottom is in. I hope you are staking for we are going to nirvana (75$) and beyond (100$). We feed the whole village of Mumbai. The thread has been alive for 40 whole days. Let's see if we can get it to 60 days. If we do then the Mumbai wairriors will eat for generations to come.

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

item.title: Why aren’t you holding BTC? — 87 replies — 30.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
Why aren’t you holding BTC?

Open thread • Replies: 87 • Updated: 2026-04-13 03:15 UTC

OP

If you’re still watching or waiting to buy BTC, why not do it now?
>I guess you’re wasting time, or maybe you just prefer altcoins. What’s your reason?

Early replies (first 3)

62087977
>>62087937
I only watch it to laugh at Saylor and you bitsteinbaggies. Not buying digital nothing.

62087993
>>62087937
Waiting for sub60K

62087997
>>62087937
I don't have enough money for it to make me rich. Alts have a good chance of vastly outperforming BTC during the next big pump. I've decided to take the potential for a 10x over the guarantee of a 2x.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62100295
>>62099777
when 2x

62100334
>>62087937
I'm all in on BTC, nothing else, I staked some, most especially now that TBV is gaining traction and most BTCFI are keeping BTC native, I believe this is a huge chance BTC hit 200K this year

62100530
>>62087937
I do and my boomer index funds like spy are outperforming it. So do my PM`s. The only reason I hold is because its tax free after 12 months, thats literally and unironically it.

62101348
>>62100334
Makes sense. Once TBVs integrate with Aave V4, BTC collateral demand could scale quickly and unlock much deeper liquidity in BTCFi.

62101354
>>62091551
You can't judge based on that lol

62101365
>>62091723
that’s basically how all markets work when you think about it.

62102223
>>62100192
Ledger is cool

62102233
>>62100530
Wtf is that

62102249
>>62101348
I see aave v3 is better

62102256
>>62100233
Shylink shitlink

62102324
>>62102223
Yeah and being able to interact with DeFi there with millions of users while keeping self custody makes everything feel a lot safer and more seamless.

62102341
>>62091734
You should have ordered healthy foodies kek

62102346
>>62102233
a teenager

62102364
>>62102249
V3 is solid. V4 just went live a few weeks ago. Deposits are still ramping up. Kinda pointless comparing that to years of development. Give it time anon.

62102377
>>62095458
reread it anon

62102716
>>62087997
I made this same mistake in the last cycle. Trust me, all the liquidity will go into BTC, so it's better to buy and keep it on TBVs for yield instead of going for alts

62103228
>>62097432
The smuggest are newfags because they're trying to build their own conviction by mimicking the toxic maximalsm during the fork wars. The oldfags have either all left or have the ability to laugh at one's own expense. Bitcoin still hasn't done anything meaningful and "orange pilling" your retarded friends doesn't help. I consider myself a closet maxi because I do believe in bitcoin but I'd never associate with them or go to a meetup/conference.

62103805
>>62095600
For many bullish reasons

62103981
>>62095620
And are you expecting what then?

62105081
>>62100014
Depends on your goal.

62105096
I DCA into Bitcoin. It can either go up or it can either go down. I'd rather take my chances than holding gold for 30 years for a +1k profit

62106216
>>62095867
Which 'obvious' shift?

62106279
>>62106216
Its quite obvious desu

62106298
btc is going to 20k if not lower

>>62097398
>'good alts' will vastly outperform
have you been asleep for 5 years?

there was like 3 alts that outperformed btc out of literally millions. your odds are terrible for alts, much better chance to just throw it all on red and call it a day

62106312
>>62106298
>btc is going to 20k if not lower
>there was like 3 alts that outperformed btc out of literally millions
Bottom signal, the retards maxxing are back

62106435
>>62106298
Idiot

62106463
>>62097125
DCA doesn't work you stupid nigger. Just look at Michael Saylor, he's down -5% after SIX YEARS of dollar cost averaging

62107082
>>62106463

ngmi

You're not smart enough.

62108172
>>62095759
Why do you say that?

62109768
>>62097398
Sure, chase “good alts”… just don’t cry in a few years when they roundtrip to zero and BTC is sitting way higher.

You’ll wish you just held the hardest asset instead of playing ETF cosplay.

item.title: Should EU countries have a power to strongly dissuade other member states from committing economical sudoku? — 74 replies — 25.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
Should EU countries have a power to strongly dissuade other member states from committing economical sudoku?

Open thread • Replies: 74 • Updated: 2026-04-13 03:12 UTC

OP

Should EU countries have a power to strongly dissuade other member states from committing economical sudoku? The example is Germany -- decided to shut down its nuke plants during the Russia energy crisis. Should other EU members be able to call for an intervention to get such a self-destructive crackhead back on track?

Germany economical failures thread.

Early replies (first 3)

62103567
>>62103558
>puccian propaganda
>"gice germany destroys itself blyat"

62103569
>>62103567
You hohols are so insufferable its incredible.
>>62103558
No EU should not get more powers, they should get less.

62103573
>>62103567
Also wtf is propaganda? That we did shut down our power plants? That we are on the way down with incredible quick increasing costs for boomer pensions, migrants, incredible slow and incabable bureaucrazy and foreign countries.....like ukraine.
And no this is not some internet doomer thing, germany is economically unironically done and it will show hard this decade.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62103974
>>62103958
Btw im not saying it cant work with 2040 technology. But it doesnt work with 2026 technology. No way to save enough gas.

62103984
>>62103969
>I am a poorfag pleb
Go back to pol then you fucking tourist.

>hydrogen I-is not for the grid
You goalpost moving retard. It is for the grid, the Bundesregierung advances its capabilities to decentraly produce electrical energy via highly mobile gas engines.

62103988
>>62103974
It already is working, 2030 data centers are going to rely on hydrogen-ready technology. Moron.

62103996
>>62103558
Merkel knew that a big war is coming and that nuclear facilities will be primary targets once all red lines have been crossed. She then used the Fukushima happening asa scapegoat to ban nuclear power plants.

62104052
>>62103996
Retarded cope.

62104077
>>62103558
Nuclear power makes sense when there's high sustained demand.
Germany shares a border with 9 other countries. There's always the possibility of buying / selling electricity to balance the grid. Fluctuating renewables also make nuclear less attractive.
Then there's specialization going on inside the EU and France happens to make the nukes and the nuclear stuff. This way Germany can host the largest conventional military without becoming too threatening to its neighbors.

62104083
>>62104077
This guy gets it. Heil EVROPA.

62104382
>>62103799
Of course it is, but not for the same reasons, today its just about racking in taxes through carbon tax, none cares about actual carbon emissions

62104495
>>62103558
The EU was designed by the Americans to bleed Europe dry.
Thanks to the EU regulators, they have no industry of note, no digital platforms of note, and they now rely on American liquified natural gas.
Every EU politician should be placed in front of a firing sqaud.

62104514
>>62104495
>t

62104859
>>62103984
>I only care about me fuck the others
Least egotistical liberal
>did not reply how it can work in winter

62104867
>>62103558
>we need to transition to clean energy
>no not THAT kind of clean energy, that one is bad because of some shit that happened 40 years ago in the soviet era
I will never understand leftoids

62104904
>>62103988
Nothing is working, we have absurd prices to import power and still need coal.
>>62103984
>>62104083
>we need to import browns (but pleeeeeeassse not where i live)
>but hail evrope
glowing hard

62106080
>>62104859
>I am a loser that larps having empathy
Fuck off back to /pol/. This board is about business, not your turkish neighbour. Hydrogen is stored in summer, what the fuck is your problem, polgroid?

62106083
>>62104904
>we have to import its sooo expensive help me I am a faggut
Read again, you fucking faggot. Europe is a balance act between our neighbours, not your perfect pig sty with enough cheap cummies.

62106615
>>62103558
It was america's plan all along. Green parties are CIA controlled. So is the medias, Merkel, and most politics in germany.
Sabotaging the nord stream 2 was a way for america to increase germany's production costs.
Higher production costs means less competitive.
Less competitive means america cans take over germany's markets.
America wants to cannibalize european markets. And also wants to absolutely prevent any Berlin-Moscow axis (alliance).

62106629
>>62106080
>>62106083
Neighbors like austria and the ones balancing us and are mad as fuck. You are just iltra retarded because you can.
>still defends brown immigration
>BUT NOT TO ME PLEASE

62106713
>>62106629
Not responsible for your well being. Fuck off, faggot. Cheap cummies is short term. EVROPA is for eternity.

62107113
>>62106713
>EVROPA is for eternity.
Its literally beeing replaced as we speak
The people define Europe not the landmass

62107123
>>62106713
>Not responsible for your well being
But you feel responsible for ukraine well beeing? Typical liberal asshole.

62107201
Oh look it's the weekly muh Germany is doomed thread again with Ivan and Sergay dropping their "truth bombs" regardless of how little their talking points depict the reality.
>62106615
It really shows also.
>comes up with "politicians are controlled by other countries"
>doesn't mention Russia and China are proven to place people in the AfD

You Russians forcing right-wing views can fuck off back to facebook. Gerhardt and Hildegard will gobble up your shitty lies and fabrications there.

62107364
>>62107113
>>62107123
You mouthbreathing retard, the underclass being replaced especially in germany and france has been ethnically diverse since hundred years, in the case of france 150 years. Ruhrpottpolacken arent Vikings.

62107520
>>62103558
Well, giving "Green" politicians any power will do that to your country. Socio-Environmentalism is a suicide cult.
Publicly they declare good sounding goals, but in the back-end they'll do everything destroying your country.
That should be the lesson to take home from early 21st century Germany: No to Green. (Regardless of the associated party.)

62107564
>>62107364
>the underclass being replaced especially in germany and france has been ethnically diverse since hundred years
>in the case of france 150 years. Ruhrpottpolacken arent Vikings.
Dude, I was in elementary back in the 90s. We had like 1-in-10 pupils that had trouble with the German language at the start of the first year. They took an extra preparation year to achieve the bare minimum of language skills required to start the first year ("school kindergarten").
These days it's more like 1-in-10 pupils that are not troubled. And it's clearly related to the origin of their parents. It's absolutely impossible to give all of them that extra year.
So the "democratic" powers that must not be questioned have deemed, that the testing standards had to be lowered. Resulting in a total education apocalypse at public schools.
Fucking 40% of 8th graders in Berlin are analphabets ffs. (By the way: How the fuck is "analphabet(s)" not in the "English (United States)"-Mozilla dictionary?)

62107579
>>62107201
>Russia and China are proven to place people in the AfD
>You Russians forcing right-wing views
Yeah man these evil evil right wingers, damn, not as if all other parties are made of usa placed people
>>62107364
>names one example that doesnt even apply
Poles and germans are the same ethnicity
>import nonwhites BUT PLEASE NOT TO ME

62107601
>>62107564
Welcome to the brave new world. What am I suppossed to do? Endlessly kvetch on an incel imageboard like you? Cheering on the golden horde that uses donkeys in the fourth year of war? Damned, get a grip on reality. Reading is for dorks.

I support capitalism, fascism and genocide of losers.

62108936
>>62107601
>I support capitalism, fascism and genocide of losers.
You support ukraine and mass migration (but not to you) and nothing else.

62108940
>>62107601
Also you did not reply to >>62107579

62109458
>>62103558
>sudoku
Should EU countries be able to stop others from playing a fill-in-the-numbers game? WTH?

62109763
>>62108940
Not wasting my time with your petty bourgeois bullshit about
>what about da turkish bulls in my cunt
>what about corruption in ukraine
>what about my fuel guzzlers
Go fuck yourself.

item.title: ITT: we discuss the upcoming weekend psyop — 63 replies — 17.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
ITT: we discuss the upcoming weekend psyop

Open thread • Replies: 63 • Updated: 2026-04-13 02:26 UTC

OP

so, lets brainstorm together

Early replies (first 3)

62102793
>>62102780

62102802
>>62102780
white women are superior

62102805
>>62102780
Ooof my cock! To be staying on topic, idc, its elon doge tweet levels at this point.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62105116
>>62102780
Brvtal mog.

62105132
>>62102780
lmao how are you dumb fuck falling for this ai? this place really is filled with jeets

62105197
>>62105132
I thought it was real but staged. I didn't know it was completely computer-generated. That's quite scary. You may be a terminally online neckbeard genius who can tell the difference but most people can't.

62105641
>>62102780
code?

62106447
>>62102780
Who are these two sweet little treats?

62106468
>>62105197
the Gemini AI logo is LITERALLY in the bottom right corner you blind retard

You don't need to be terminally online to know about that

62106493
ok, the weekend psyop was:

>((((no deal bettween the mutts and the sandniggas)))

so load up your longs because this will be green in a few hours.

62106500
>>62106447
Left: Meghan Bytes
Right: Lily Bits
All the way left: Me
>>62106493
>no deal
Thanks, Israel!

62106512
>>62102780
Can you stop bumping this thread? My balls are dry like the death valley.

62106525
>>62106500
Thanks. Couldn't find them though.

62106537
>>62106525
(Its an ai image, the names were a joke)

62106540
>>62106537
Darn.

62106557
>>62106512
>gooners gonna goon
seek help nigga

62106570
>>62102780

62106585
>>62106557
Nigger she is literally perfect.

62106587
>>62106585
she doesnt exist, so seek help

62106589
>>62106570
this goes straight into my meme folder

62107696
>>62102932
You can appreciate the temperament of the white woman more when you realize the cause. The romans wrote a lot about how the germanic womenfolk would often kill cowardly warriors from their own tribe (sometimes their own sons), and kill themselves and their children when their tribe lost a decisive battle: they chose death over enslavement. The Germanic tribes also selectively bred this rebellious spitefulness into their women via the tradition of the ritual sacrifice of all the willing young concubines of a chief when he died: that is, they killed the women who were most susceptible to social pressure and who were the least rebellious. All of this made sure that the men of the tribe would never ever be cucked, and that other tribes were not going to have much luck with raiding for brides. This is why shrewish white women act the way they do, constantly rebellious and a pain compared to oriental women.

62107705
>>62102780
I NEED A SOURCE AND I NEED IT NOW

62108086
>>62107705
you need to learn to read at elementary school level

62108099
>>62107696
>All of this made sure that the men of the tribe would never ever be cucked

62108110
>>62106468
If you were focusing on the bottom right corner of that picture then you are probably gay.

62108416
>>62102780
The talks themselves were a psyop. Both sides wanted to take a breather.
Financially speaking, they are doing their best to keep oil under 100.
>>62106587
Why does it matter as long as it's an image? All images are essentially fake, whether it is AI or not.

62108485
>>62108099
i was going to say
what happened to this attitude if this was the intended outcome? they basically surrendered themselves the microsecond the government promised endless gibs and foreign men.

62109599
>>62108416
>The talks themselves were a psyop

we alredy know that, thanks for confirmation, the question is, what comes first, 55k or 80k?

>All images are essentially fake, whether it is AI or not.

pic rel, is real, trust me on this one

>jannies don't do anything funny, there is nothing not even a nipple visible

62109608
Shortages will hit most of the world within the next 10 days plus US taxes are due on April 15th. Think Bitcoin will go up? I don't.

62109611
>>62109608
are the shortages with you right now?

62109615
>>62109608
As it relates to taxes, everyone always puts things off as long as possible. I'm sure many were hoping for Bitcoin to sweep up into the $80ks.

62109639
>>62107705
it's AI

62109647
>>62109615
historically, it always dumped

item.title: What are the financial implications of every job in filmmaking being completely eradicated >dude it's only like 99% perf… — 14 replies — 14.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
What are the financial implications of every job in filmmaking being completely eradicated >dude it's only like 99% perf…

Open thread • Replies: 14 • Updated: 2026-04-13 05:09 UTC

OP

What are the financial implications of every job in filmmaking being completely eradicated

https://youtu.be/-Rzl7nUdEs4

>dude it's only like 99% perfect

Okay, see you in ONE YEAR

Early replies (first 3)

62108853
>>62108820
anti-Semitic

62108877
>>62108820
Im hoping we get a future where indie/small team devs have AI enabling them to compete with large studios in media.

Especially hoping when VR tech catches up it is created by an ocean of smaller devs. A more cynical me says that things will not be allowed to disrupt the industry

62108878
This is antisemitic

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62108985
>>62108877
That's pretty much exactly what this video is

62109051
>>62108820
Oy vey.

62109061
>>62108820
i really like their work. ai isnt quite there yet, good enough to tell a story though. there are lots of visual inconsistencies if you are looking for them, and the lip syncing is bad. if you have messed around with ai you'll understand the editing choice they have to make for these videos. lots of compromises. you are pretty much stuck only having people walking around and close ups of faces for your narrative. you wouldnt be able to do a space marine battle or something. and obviously a skilled writer and editor and sound mixer worked on this project, not something that a jeet could make

62109656
>>62108820
I feel fucking nothing when I watch this. Even with some of the newer hollywood films I at least feel disgust. This is gonna be used for weird fetish shit thats about it. Porn is probably long term over. but not cinema. Theres a reason they have to release this shit on youtube. No one is paying to see this.

62109713
>>62108820
looks like all the Love, Death & Robots animator types are going out of business kek

62109720
>>62109656
cope

62109731
>>62108820
Movies are about telling stories. A shitskin can have the most sophisticated robotic monkey at his command, but if he doesn't know how to tell a good story, compose his shots, edit, then it's garbage. This whole video is a disjointed mess, cutting to a new character mid conversation, mid scene, without introducing them. AIslop is AIslop because the people using it only know how to make slop.

62109736
>>62109731
This whole video reads like a 7 year old going "and then he did this thing and then he did this thing and then there was a spaceship and then there was a rat man, oh look a snail, now there cool guy is here he's so cool". Zero sense of how to write a story.

62109968
>>62108820
it couldnt happen to better people (hollywood)

62109979
>>62109968
yeah it's hard to feel bad for hollywood getting crushed by AI when you have to think back 10+ years for the last even halfway decent movie or tv show

62109986
>>62108820
Gossip Goblin is great.

item.title: So, now that assblaster was confirmed controlled opposition, and LINK holders have become "the Cuckolds of Crypto"... — 84 replies — 10.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
So, now that assblaster was confirmed controlled opposition, and LINK holders have become "the Cuckolds of Crypto"...

Open thread • Replies: 84 • Updated: 2026-04-12 22:12 UTC

OP

So, now that assblaster was confirmed controlled opposition, and LINK holders have become "the Cuckolds of Crypto"... shouldn't we have a look at what he told us *not* to buy?

He tried very hard to steer us away from one coin in particular back in 2018.

They wanted you out.

Early replies (first 3)

62077049
well he was right about raiblocks

62077089
>>62077049
Only in the sense that he was "right" about LINK. It's price did go up, yet it achieved nothing. Sergey met Trump and still nobody cares about smartcontracts. LINK had every chance to succeed but failed.

>Controlled opposition is a political or strategic tactic where a governing body, organization, or elite group secretly supports, infiltrates, or manages its own opposition to manipulate dissent, control narratives, and prevent real challenges to the status quo

A functional stateless currency would challenge the status quo, and now it's been "over 5 years under the radar".

Watch how long this thread stays up.

62077098
>>62077000
>>62077049
>>62077089
Bullish for XRP

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62092795
If you bought the "make it stack" back in 2018. How have you not killed yourself.
Only swingies made it or big boys with their 100k stacks.

62093751
>>62087403
shut up stinkbag
you lost the game of life

62095975
>>62078703
>a singular tree

62100199
cuckolds!

62100381
>>62077089
Link is still like 7% inflation.
We still got a few years for "cheapies"
Lines right up with economic collapse time-frames tho.

62100386
>>62100381
Thought experiment:

What would happen to the price of nano if the inventor of nano shook the US President's hand?

That is why they wanted you to buy LINK instead

62100392
>>62100381
>Link is still like 7% inflation.
Bitcoin had triple digit inflation when it pumped the hardest.
ETH had 10% inflation when it pumped the hardest.
Solana had over 500% inflation when it pumped the hardest.

If you want to go more recent:
Sui had 200% inflation when it pumped the hardest.
Hyperliquid had 25% inflation when it pumped from rank 200+ to rank 10.

Stop being this fucking stupid.

62100973
>>62100386
>What would happen to the price of nano if the inventor of nano shook the US President's hand?


you sound like a boomer yelling at the sky
how does running up to a podium and shaking the hand of the least credible president in the united states' 250 year history accrue value to you a funding altcoin

62101022
>>62100392

so your logic is that because the top few crypto assets with mass appeal pumped x amount despite inflationary tokenomics, that means your funding coin should too?

let me state the obvious which is that there isn't enough liquidity for this happen across 30 million altcoins

should the rocks in my backyard also pump in value because gold went up?
should houses in the trailer park also pump the same as waterfront mansions because real estate went up?
should you get laid more because more women are becoming whores?

62101041
>>62100381
I’ve noticed Sergey tends to drop news when there is very bearish things happening in the world. Everything about this project seems like it wants as few eyes on it as possible. Very strange.

62101064
>>62101022
HUBRIS

62101272
>>62100973
Because my altcoin actually threatens the system

Yours is token not needed

62102231
>>62077000
So, now that OP is confirmed opposition, time to remind him: the pool is closed.

62102327
>>62077784
Revenue streams will multiple by orders of magnitude over the next few years. Price will follow naturally.

62103489
>>62101022
I didn't claim inflation means it should pump. How fucking dumb are you.

62104109
>>62103489
>comparing POW to market selling on a CEX
>comparing a supply of 21 million to 1 fucking billion
>unable to comprehend that inflation is a death spiral when there are 0 incentives to create buying pressure
seriously, how fucking dumb are you to even use this shitty argument in 2017+9

62104717
>>62104109
>>comparing POW to market selling on a CEX
Only two out of five in my list are PoW.

>>comparing a supply of 21 million to 1 fucking billion
I'm comparing percentages.

You're literally subsaharan IQ tier.

62104804
>>62103489
>I didn't claim inflation means it should pump.

you insinuated that the market wasn't "fair" because those coins pumped and yours didn't

62104808
Adem was right.
Adem won

62104969
>>62104804
I insinuated that it's retarded to blame inflation for Link not pumping when pretty much everything that did pump had higher inflation.

62105435
>>62077423
kekin

62105506
BOOOOOOOOOOOM

62105533
>>62083016
> why exactly did this site die off so quickly

Glowies deployed pic rel and won

62105587
>>62077000
XRP SUCKS and you know it, Jabroni!

62106385
>>62105587
XRB not XRP

62106404
>>62104969
and you're unbelievably retarded for picking 5 outliers with extraordinary circumstances out of 30 million crypto shitcoins
fuck off and die you gaslighting cunt

62106430
>>62106404
THANK YOU
god am i so sick of stinks
EVERY TIME A STINK OPENS HIS MOUTH IM LIKE SHUT THE FUCK UUUUUUUP

62106440
>>62106404
>outliers
Add BNB, XRP, and Tron and it's the entire top 10.

And why do you keep replying with a different ID?

62108165
>>62104969
>I insinuated that it's retarded to blame inflation for Link not pumping when pretty much everything that did pump had higher inflation

yes i understand what you said but you don't appear to. you don't have as many buyers as btc, eth, sol... so yes buddy inflation does matter

link holders are like children yelling to their parents about how life isn't fair. as if there's some unwritten rule that markets have to be fair, and if you debate hard enough you'll convince the market it's wrong and finally have some gains


it's like a kid on a high school basketball team arguing with the coach about fundamentals because he's mimicking players in the nba. it's like yeah buddy lebron james can get away with doing xyz because he's a gifted athlete hall of famer. you on the other hand are a bum who can't touch the rim, so just stfu and listen to the coach.

that analogy is basically btc and other large coins versus link. when you're a piece of shit coin with the ugliest nastiest group of losers in the world as your holders, everything matters.

62108734
>>62108165
Is this supposed to be a bit?
I checked and this doesn't seem to be a copypasta.
